mapper.select: SELECT p.*, e.equipment_name FROM inspection_plans p LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.equipment_code = e.equipment_code WHERE p.plan_id = #{planId}
SELECT p.*, e.equipment_name FROM inspection_plans p LEFT JOIN equipment e ON p.equipment_code = e.equipment_code WHERE p.fiscal_year = #{fiscalYear} ORDER BY p.equipment_code, p.planned_date
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_plans SET equipment_code = #{equipmentCode}, template_id = #{templateId}, planned_date = #{plannedDate}, team_code = #{teamCode}, person_code = #{personCode}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
